# Case export-type-style: Step 1

## Changed Files
- style.css

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 39
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 830

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":["./del.css"]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./style.css

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./style.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.is("./style.css", ".style_css-style-class {\n\tcolor: green;\n\tbackground-color: yellow;\n\tpadding: 20px;\n}\n");
var exports = {
  "style-class": "style_css-style-class",
};
// only invalidate when locals change
var stringified_exports = JSON.stringify(exports);
if (module.hot.data && module.hot.data.exports && module.hot.data.exports != stringified_exports) {
  module.hot.invalidate();
} else {
  module.hot.accept();
}
module.hot.dispose(function(data) { data.exports = stringified_exports; });
__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},

},function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```
